roles.content: End-of-life ethics: A comprehensive examination of end-of-life ethics within Ethics & Moral Philosophy, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
Critical perspectives on end-of-life ethics: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to end-of-life ethics.
Recent developments in end-of-life ethics: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of end-of-life ethics in contemporary philosophy.
